name: Impossible Fudgy Nut Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 sweet cooking chocolate, melted and cooled
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease a pie plate.
3. In a blender, beat all ingredients together except nuts until smooth for about 2 minutes. Stop the blender occasionally to stir if needed.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie plate and sprinkle with chopped nuts.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Allow the pie to cool for 5 minutes before serving.
7. Optionally, top with ice cream, crushed peppermint candies sprinkled over whipped cream, flavored whipped cream, or candied fruit.
